summary: A post pairing two clips: Trump campaign-rally speech footage (with a 'TEXT TRUMP to 88022' lower-third) where he says he will invoke the Alien Enemies Act, plus a Fox News studio interview of Sec. Noem under a 'MIGRANT CRIME CRACKDOWN' chyron citing deportation statistics. Both are speech and news footage with no music track. This tweet has two media parts, both speech and news clips. On-screen text reads 'TEXT MICHIGAN to 88022 / TEXT TRUMP to 88022', 'TRUMP VANCE Make America Great Again', 'FOX NEWS LIVE EXCLUSIVE', 'MIGRANT CRIME CRACKDOWN', 'TRUMP ADMINISTRATION DEFENDS DEPORTATION FLIGHTS', and 'BREAKING TONIGHT'.
